tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I made him do this work. I got him to do this work. I get my car repaired. She makes good food. I got this job.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He made me laugh. I got him to agree. She gets her hair cut. The teacher made us stay quiet. I get my homework done.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वह हमेशा गलतियाँ करता है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "She make good food."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She made me stop. I got him to understand. I am getting my house painted. He makes good decisions.
